calendar.matters:
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-03-2011 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Steven A. MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Nancy Koch, Trustee of the Nancy J. Koch Living Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness Nancy Koch was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Daniel Corrado.

After hearing the testimony, considering of the evidence and Exhibits presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 4043 19th Street, San Francisco, CA 94114.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due Rent - $3,750.00
Holdover Damages - $4,000.00
Costs - $540.00
Attoreny fees - $5,000.00
Total - $13,290.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Off Calendar
